UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE EACH ELEMENT OF BREACH OF CONTRACT, FRAUD, NEGLIGENCE AND VIOLATION OF CCP 17200. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEY, MONICA D. JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED THE EXISTENCE OF A CONTRACT AND BREACH OF THAT CONTRACT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD. PLAINTIFF SHALL PLEAD, WITH SPECIFICITY, FACTS REGARDING PLAINTIFF'S JUSTIFIABLE RELIANCE ON DEFENDANT'S MISREPRESENTATIONS AND THE RESULTING DAMAGES. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER AS TO THE NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF SHOULD AMEND THE FACTS REGARDING DEFENDANT'S DUTY AND BREACH OF THAT DUTY. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER AS TO THE NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER AS TO THE NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. SEE PATRICK V. ALACER CORP., 167 CAL.APP.4TH 995, 1015 (2008). FINALLY, AS TO THE WRONGFUL EVICTION CAUSE OF ACTION, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Defendant's Demurrer to the First Cause of Action for Breach of Contract is OVERRULED. Plaintiff has sufficiently pled the existence of a contract and breach of that contract. Defendant's Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the second cause of action for Fraud. Plaintiff shall plead, with specificity, facts regarding Plaintiff's justifiable reliance on Defendant's misrepresentations and the resulting damages. Defendant's Demurrer as to the Negligent Misrepresentation cause of action is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff should amend the facts regarding Defendant's duty and breach of that duty. Defendant's Demurrer as to the Negligence cause of action is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Defendant's demurrer as to the Negligent Infliction of Emotional Distress cause of action is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. See Patrick v. Alacer Corp., 167 Cal.App.4th 995, 1015 (2008). Finally, as to the Wrongful Eviction cause of action, Defendant's demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
